title: NavoX Training Lead for Dog/Puppy 20m Black, Extra Long Line Dog Lead, Nylon Long Dog training Leash for Pet Recall, hiking, camping,hunting, backyard
features: Dimensions: The dog leash is 20m/65ft long and 2cm wide.

Well made Training Leash:The training leash is made of strong nylon with durable metal clip, the 29 cm D-ring cushioned handle is firm easy to be hold, works well if you want to tie it to or loose it to your waist, the leash is helpful and friendly for trainers.
360 degree Swivel-style Stainless Steel Clip:The dog lead comes with a Swivel-style Buckle for easy to attach to your dog collar, rotated by 360 degree secure your pet to play in any way safely.
Long Lead:The 20M long dog lead is used for training your dog recall obedience, Great for hiking, camping, training, hunting, backyard, beach, recall training, outdoor play or swimming.
Suitable for all Dogs:This long dog lead is used for training your dog to get used to the distance from you, help your puppy keep up with you a certain distance.
description: NavoX Long Dog Lead 20M Black is made by Nylon with 360 degree Swivel-style Stainless Steel Clipper Specification: Delivery: 20M Training lead x1 Size: 20M/65ft length x 2CM wide Material: Stainless Steel+Nylon Color: Black A practical long lead for: Great lead for Samoyed, Teddy, Husky, Rottweiler, Alaska, Chihuahua, Schnauzer, Miniature Pinscher, Golden Retriever, German Shepherd, Tibetan Mastiff and more Great training lead for : The dog training lead is long enough for your dog free to be recalled, hiking, camping,hunting, backyard playing, no worries of losing your dog in outdoor. Easy to Use: The trigger Clipper is easy to fasten to dog’s collar and it is washable, very easy to clean.
